prompt: Atmospheric lifestyle wide photography. Modern wellness home gym interior at golden hour — dark, moody, cinematic. Dark matte equipment, dark walls, warm amber-golden side light casting selective rays across the scene. Left 45% of frame is very dark (near black gradient) for text legibility. Right 55% shows warm amber atmospheric detail: subtle shaker bottles on dark shelf, blurred health supplements, condensation on glass vessel, warm pendant light. No people, no faces, no logos, no product cans. The entire atmosphere should feel premium and aspirational — like a high-end supplement brand campaign background. Dark navy and warm amber are the dominant colors. Shot: 24mm f/2.8 ISO 400, softly blurred background elements beyond 1.5m. Cinematic underexposed look with selective warm light accents. No harsh flash.
negative_prompt: people, faces, bright white background, overexposed, product logos, Glucofood can, text overlay, watermark, cartoon, illustration, stock photo generic gym, fluorescent lighting
